statement: In every magma, Equation 2845 (`x = ((y * z) * (w * u)) * u`) implies Equation 1403 (`x = y * (((z * w) * x) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0714
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op w u)) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z w) x) w))
